raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the v1 result-only shell, the producer linkage, the paramsweep signal, the alt-channel collapse, the inert swapped-flag control, the visibility seam, and the v2 successor boundary.

reasons_for_quarantine: Catalog filename presence is not treated as repo-top evidence admission.
